source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-151 Manufacturing Information/Attachment 1.2 A-PMCP-5-013 Manufacturing process chart A1717MCW.xlsx

document.title: 제조공정도 / Process Manufacture Control Plan
document.documentType: Manufacturing process chart / process manufacture control plan

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturing process chart/control plan for model A1717MCW / S4343-AW, revised as Rev.0 on 2022.12.07.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines manufacturing, inspection, control records, responsible personnel, and related standards from material receipt through shipment.
keyPoints: Document header identifies 문서번호 A-PMCP-5-013 and model A1717MCW / S4343-AW.
Revision history states Rev.0, 2022.12.07, 신규 등록.

Process steps include material receipt, IQC, Laser Scribe, EMI Sheet attachment, Edge Sealing, OLB, PB, inspections, assembly, electronic test, aging test, final test, electrical safety inspection, labeling, packing inspection, and shipment.
Inspection frequency is generally 매 Run or 매 LOT 입고 시, with 전수 sampling.
Final Test includes detector performance inspection such as DQE, MTF, and NPS.

evidence.claim: The document is a manufacturing process chart/control plan.
evidence.evidenceText: 제 조 공 정 도; Process Manufacture Control Plan

evidence.claim: The manufacturing process chart is for model A1717MCW / S4343-AW.
The document header identifies document number A-PMCP-5-013.
A second document-number line identifies A-PMCP-5-006 as Process Manufacture Control Plan.
The revision is Rev.0 and the revision date is 2022.12.07.
Revision history records Rev.0 as 신규 등록 on 2022.12.07.
The process includes material receipt/preparation with checks of received quantity and packaging condition.
evidence.evidenceText: 자재 입고/준비; 발주수량 대비 입고량 확인; 자재 포장상태 확인

evidence.claim: Incoming inspection requires appearance, dimensions, and characteristics to meet criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: IQC (수입 검사); 외관, 치수, 특성, 기준 만족 할 것

evidence.claim: Electronic Test checks power-on dark image acquisition, wired/wireless communication, firmware, and MAC address.
evidence.evidenceText: Electronic Test; 전원 ON, Dark 영상 취득; 유/무선 통신확인; firmware & Mac Adress 확인

evidence.claim: Aging Test applies a 40℃ / 6Hr recipe while power is on and dark image acquisition is performed.
Final Test includes X-ray image inspection and detector performance inspection including DQE, MTF, and NPS.
evidence.evidenceText: Final Test; X-ray 영상 검사 - Defect, 구동 상태; Detector 성능 검사 - DQE, MTF, NPS 등

evidence.claim: Electrical Safety Inspection includes leakage current, dielectric withstand voltage, ground resistance, and power input tests.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrical Safety Inspection; 누설 전류 시험; 내전압 시험; 접지 저항 시험; 전원 입력 시험

evidence.claim: Labeling and packing includes product label attachment, sealed packaging, accessory packaging, box packaging, box label attachment, and seal sticker attachment.
evidence.evidenceText: Labeling & Packing; 제품 Label 부착 및 밀봉포장, 액세서리 포장; BOX 포장 및 Box Label 부착, 봉인스티커 부착

evidence.claim: Shipment requires checking product packaging condition/specification and destination information.
evidence.evidenceText: 출하; 제품 포장 상태 및 사양 확인; 출고지 정보 확인 할 것

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; MFDS/domestic appears only as provided source metadata authoritySignal.
The document contains conflicting document numbers: header 문서번호 A-PMCP-5-013 and table 문서 번호 A-PMCP-5-006.
제정일자 is shown as '-' while 개정일자 and revision history provide 2022.12.07.
Source appears to be an OCR/preprocessed spreadsheet export with line breaks and typographical errors such as Paenl, 왼관, Tepe, Contect, and Mac Adress.
